name: get_user_profile
description: Retrieve user profile information including name, profile picture URL, locale, timezone, and gender to personalize the user experience.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The unique Facebook user ID of the Messenger user.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to retrieve: first_name, last_name, profile_pic, locale, timezone, gender.
